definitions: The ancient Greek god of trade, heraldry, merchants, roads, sport, travelers, and athletes, known for his speed and cunning.
A luxury fashion house based in Paris, France, known for its high-end leather goods, accessories, and ready-to-wear.
A genus of butterflies in the family Hesperiidae.
examples: Hermes was often depicted with winged sandals.
She carried a classic Hermes handbag.
The Hermes butterfly is found in tropical regions.
